bucket.description: Specifies the S3 bucket to apply the lifecycle configuration rules to; must be an existing bucket name.

expected_bucket_owner.description: Specifies the AWS account ID of the bucket owner. Required for cross-account operations to verify ownership.

rule.description: Defines the lifecycle rules for managing the lifecycle of objects in the S3 bucket, including transitions, expirations, and deletions.
rule.type: list(object({id: string,prefix: optional(string),status: string,abort_incomplete_multipart_upload: list(object({days_after_initiation: optional(number)})),expiration: list(object({date: optional(string),days: optional(number),expired_object_delete_marker: optional(bool)})),filter: list(object({object_size_greater_than: optional(number),object_size_less_than: optional(number),prefix: optional(string),and: list(object({object_size_greater_than: optional(number),object_size_less_than: optional(number),prefix: optional(string),tags: optional(map(string))})),tag: list(object({key: string,value: string}))})),noncurrent_version_expiration: list(object({newer_noncurrent_versions: optional(number),noncurrent_days: number})),noncurrent_version_transition: list(object({newer_noncurrent_versions: optional(number),noncurrent_days: number,storage_class: string})),transition: list(object({date: optional(string),days: optional(number),storage_class: string}))}))

timeouts.description: Defines the maximum duration to wait for the lifecycle configuration of the S3 bucket to be created, updated, or deleted.

transition_default_minimum_object_size.description: Specifies the minimum object size (in bytes) for applying the default transition rule in the bucket's lifecycle configuration. Must be a positive integer.
